title: Define option graph schema v1
description: Define canonical schema for atomic/composite execution options and typed edges.
acceptance_criteria: Schema documents required/optional fields; edge semantics are explicit; examples included; tests prove schema acceptance/rejection cases.

title: Implement schema validator and lint rules
description: Build validator that catches cycles, missing nodes, invalid edge types, and malformed guards.
acceptance_criteria: Validator fails invalid catalogs in CI with actionable errors; regression tests cover major failure modes.

title: Seed canonical YAML catalog with baseline pathways
description: Add baseline option entries including react preflight and design review composites.
acceptance_criteria: Seed catalog passes validator; pathway expansion produces deterministic ordered steps.
depends_on_logical: Implement schema validator and lint rules

title: Build deterministic resolver contract
description: Implement resolver that selects option pathways and emits bounded execution bundles.
acceptance_criteria: Identical inputs produce identical bundles; tie-break logic is explicit and tested.
depends_on_logical: Seed canonical YAML catalog with baseline pathways

title: Enforce resolver bundle gate in dispatch preflight
description: Block execution dispatch when resolver bundle is absent or invalid.
acceptance_criteria: Dispatch rejects missing/invalid bundle with structured reason; integration tests cover gate behavior.

title: Build YAML to DB mirror pipeline
description: Implement mirror builder that materializes YAML canonical options into query-ready DB objects.
acceptance_criteria: Mirror refresh is idempotent and deterministic; mirror can be fully rebuilt from YAML.
depends_on_logical: Seed canonical YAML catalog with baseline pathways

title: Add parity checks between YAML and DB mirror
description: Add parity checks to detect semantic drift between canonical YAML and DB mirror representations.
acceptance_criteria: Parity mismatch fails CI; drift report includes specific option IDs/fields.
depends_on_logical: Build YAML to DB mirror pipeline

title: Integrate trace-driven option scoring with safeguards
description: Use planning trace outcomes for option ranking with confidence/weight safeguards.
acceptance_criteria: Score updates are bounded and explainable; poor-quality traces do not dominate ranking.
depends_on_logical: Enforce resolver bundle gate in dispatch preflight
Add parity checks between YAML and DB mirror

title: Add observability report for option quality and drift
description: Add report/dashboard output for option success, failures, drift incidents, and ranking movement.
acceptance_criteria: Report exposes top regressions and most reliable pathways over rolling windows.
depends_on_logical: Integrate trace-driven option scoring with safeguards
